description: Thrive Richly — 1000 Facebook post ideas based on Jeff Rose's Top 20 Highest-Paid Posts playbook. 200 days × 5 posts/day. Each post follows a proven archetype formula. Script generates full caption via Claude API at posting time.

archetypes.name: Philosophical Rhythm
archetypes.formula: Rhythmic repetition (You X... You Y...) building to emotional truth. Pure feelings, no data.
archetypes.example_hook: You work 8 hours to afford 4 hours of freedom.

archetypes.name: Brand Transformation Story
archetypes.formula: Recognizable brand → surprising business lesson → universal wealth principle.
archetypes.example_hook: Chick-fil-A is closed every Sunday. And they STILL outsell everyone.

archetypes.name: Data Alarm
archetypes.formula: Scary stat + historical context (only happened X times) + practical takeaway.
archetypes.example_hook: 78% of Americans live paycheck to paycheck.

archetypes.name: Side-by-Side Comparison
archetypes.formula: Two people, same income, different choices → wildly different outcomes. Split format.
archetypes.example_hook: Meet James and David. Both earn $60K a year.

archetypes.name: Trending News + Emotion
archetypes.formula: Combine emotional rhythm with current event or viral story. Layer feeling onto news.
archetypes.example_hook: A 23-year-old just made $2.4M selling a digital product.

archetypes.name: Benchmark/Ranking
archetypes.formula: Age-based or income-based comparison chart. People check where they fall, then argue.

archetypes.name: Ranked List / Leaderboard
archetypes.formula: Numbered ranking — people debate positions, share their pick, screenshot it.
archetypes.example_hook: Top 10 side hustles by average monthly income:

archetypes.name: Lazy Millionaire Blueprint
archetypes.formula: Step-by-step compound interest calculation with specific numbers. Shows boring = rich.
archetypes.example_hook: Invest $750/month starting at 28. Here's what happens:

archetypes.name: Money Rules / Actionable List
archetypes.formula: Numbered actionable rules — screenshot-worthy. Each rule = 1-2 sentences max.
archetypes.example_hook: 7 Money Rules That Changed My Life:

archetypes.name: Nostalgia / Wisdom Story
archetypes.formula: Personal/family story → emotional lesson → connection to building wealth differently.
archetypes.example_hook: My dad worked 60-hour weeks for 30 years.
